{"credits": [{"type": "analyst", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/335669?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jmooring/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jmooring/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jmooring/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jmooring/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/jmooring", "id": 335669, "login": "jmooring", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjMzNTY2OQ==", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jmooring/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jmooring/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jmooring/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jmooring/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jmooring/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/jmooring", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-50133", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:P/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "**Commit:** [e41a06447d](https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/commit/e41a06447d) — _Disallow HTML content by default_
**Affected versions:** all Hugo versions prior to v0.162.0.
**Fixed in:** v0.162.0.
**Severity:** Low to Medium, depending on threat model. Not an issue if you fully trust every file under `/content` and every content adapter you load.

**Description.** Hugo accepts content files in several markup formats. Files mapped to the `text/html` media type (typically `.html` files under `/content`, or pages produced by a content adapter that sets `content.mediaType = "text/html"`) had their body emitted verbatim into the rendered page. A site that ingests HTML content from an untrusted source — for example, a CMS-backed editor, a content adapter pulling from an external API, or an automated import pipeline — could therefore be served stored cross-site scripting.

**Mitigation.** v0.162.0 introduces a `security.allowContent` whitelist with `text/html` denied by default. Sites that intentionally author HTML content can opt back in:

```toml
[security]
allowContent = ['.*']
```

This only affects pages whose source file (or content adapter output) declares an HTML media type; Markdown, AsciiDoc, Org, Pandoc and reStructuredText content is unaffected.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00187, "percentile": 0.0851}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-c54g-xjwj-8g82", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-16T19:22:14Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c54g-xjwj-8g82", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-c54g-xjwj-8g82"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-50133"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-16T19:22:14Z", "references": ["https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/security/advisories/GHSA-c54g-xjwj-8g82", "https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/commit/e41a06447daa3071a01f333fdcec0a5153c3c8d1", "https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases/tag/v0.162.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c54g-xjwj-8g82"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/gohugoio/hugo/security-advisories/GHSA-c54g-xjwj-8g82", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo", "summary": "Hugo: XSS via text/html content files", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-16T19:22:16Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-c54g-xjwj-8g82", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.162.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/gohugoio/hugo"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.162.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Hugo: XSS via text/html content files
